prompt: Create a square, highly polished anime light-novel cover illustration: an extreme close-up frontal portrait of a young girl with pale peach skin, a small slightly open mouth, soft blush on both cheeks, and huge sparkling aqua-blue eyes filled with detailed reflections of white flowers, yellow light, sky blue, and star-like highlights. She has messy, delicate, wind-swept hair in deep teal with pale blonde front bangs, with many thin strands crossing her face and catching bright white sunlight. Surround her face with an abundant wildflower frame containing exactly 22 prominent visible blossoms: 5 blue flowers, 4 white daisies, 4 yellow-orange daisies, 3 pink flowers, 2 purple flowers, 1 white flower near the top, and 3 tiny background blossoms, with long green stems and leaves weaving around the edges. Use a dreamy spring atmosphere, bright cyan and cream background glow, soft bokeh, floating petals, dappled leaf shadows across the forehead, nose, and cheeks, glossy highlights, and cinematic overexposed sunlight from the upper right. Place large white vertical Japanese title text 花 in the upper left, bold elegant Mincho-style typography with a faint pink glow, and smaller white author text 椰野 なぎ beneath it on the left. The composition should feel like a professional Japanese book or music thumbnail cover, vibrant, emotional, clean typography, no border, no extra logos, ultra-detailed 2D anime illustration.
